title: Raven Client
description: The best way to play Minecraft.
body:
# Raven Client has been archived in favor of the upcoming [OptiFine for Fabric v5](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optifine-for-fabric)!
[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/raven-client?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/raven-client/) [![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/imodder/raven-client?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/imodder/raven-client/issues)

[![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/raven-client?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Latest)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/raven-client/versions) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/game%20versions-1.20.1%2C%201.21.4-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/raven-client/versions)
# Before using Raven Client, learn how to configure it below!

<details>
<summary>Guide</summary>

First of all, **do not disable/delete any mods.** They are **all** required, but can be turned off if you follow the steps below.
- Run Minecraft
- Click `Mods`
- Hover over `ModSets`
- Click the `Configure` icon
- Disable/enable any features you want from there.

Note: if you disable or delete **any** mods, you won't be able to open the 'ModSets' configuration menu. If you want a mod to be able to be toggled, request a feature [here.](https://github.com/iModder/Raven-Client/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)

</details>



## **What is this?**
Raven Client is built directly off of my modpack [OptiFine for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optifine-for-fabric). It includes **extra features** that are essential for gameplay such as low fire, low shield, no darkness, connecting to **any server version**, and so much more!

## **Why Raven Client instead of others?**
Raven Client is **modular**. This means that it is VERY customizable. Only **essential** mods are enabled by default, and the more game-changing ones are left **disabled**. This allows for a wide range of playstyles, from a **beginner** to Minecraft, to a long time player, to someone switching clients!
Raven Client is also extremely performance focused. When using Raven Client, I get over **2x the FPS** than when using OptiFine!


**Here is how many FPS I get using OptiFine:**
![OptiFine FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eab07d43b64748d5ef8af561a25573b312154374.png)

**Here is how many FPS I get using Raven Client:**
![Raven Client FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1395133b5ca39a174e3d5ae1ead1681dce7285c4.png)

[![Available for Fabric](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_64h.png?raw=true)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Built for Raven Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/495ba66fd1d2f859aca4d73af27f16d909864eab.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/raven-client/)

Something **wrong**? Want a **feature**? Go to the official [**bug tracker!**](https://github.com/iModder/OptiFine-for-Fabric/issues) My **goal** is to make _Raven Client_ the **best** it can be. Whether that means adding a mod or fixing a bug, I am **happy** to help in any way I can.
